# Jaromelu Task Queue (legacy)

The active build system no longer uses this file as the live queue.

Use [WORK_ORDERS.md](./WORK_ORDERS.md) for dispatchable Codex work and [THREADS.md](./THREADS.md) for live thread coordination. This file remains only as a compatibility pointer for historical run reports and older references that mention `TASKS.md`.

Do not add new tasks here.
